coverage_notes: This file is structured for app completeness. Fault codes are mapped at family level using official support/manufacturer manuals where publicly available. PCB and certain spare-part numbers are intentionally left as VERIFY fields unless a model-specific match is securely confirmed from the exact sticker / E-Nr / revision. This avoids wrong-board ordering on region or revision variants.

models.service_notes: Use full model sticker, production index, and PCB/software revision before ordering parts. Family-level faults below are broadly applicable; code map may vary slightly by market and chassis. Exact board and lock numbers remain sticker-sensitive; use a photo of the existing PCB label before purchase.

service_identity.sticker_location_hint: Use the type plate / rating plate around the inner door area.
service_identity.parts_ordering_rule: Bosch/BSH spare parts must be matched by E-Nr and often FD/Z-Nr as well.

faults.title: Door not closed
faults.description: Door is not properly closed or lock not confirmed.

faults.title: Water supply issue
faults.description: Water inflow time exceeded or supply is insufficient.

faults.title: Drain issue
faults.description: Drain time exceeded or pump/filter/drain hose blocked.

faults.title: AquaStop / leak detected
faults.description: Leak protection activated or base tray water detected.

faults.title: Turbidity sensor issue
faults.description: Sensor-related error on families using this function; verify exact platform.

faults.title: Pressure sensor issue
faults.description: Pressure analog sensor or pressure switch reading abnormal.

parts.part_name: Drain pump filter cap / clean-out set
parts.notes: Match filter housing diameter and thread style.
Confirm hose route and diameter.
Match tub lip and front panel clamp style.
Confirm wattage, NTC position, and flange style.
Match resistance curve and connector.
Only for belt-drive families; not used on direct-drive models.
Length and damping force depend on drum size.
Connector and latch profile must match exact cabinet.
Single / dual / triple feed varies by dispenser design.
Use Bosch E-Nr and FD number before ordering.
Lock style differs by chassis.
Single and multi-way valves exist.
